content.query:
SELECT 

lv.EmployeeLeaversID
,lv.EmployeeID
,lv.ReasonForLeaving
,lv.EmploymentEndDate
,cal.CalendarYear
,cal.CalendarMonth
,cal.FinancialYear

FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_leavers_dim] lv

LEFT JOIN [default].[dbo].[calendar_dim] cal 
ON cal.CalendarDate = lv.EmploymentEndDate

LEFT JOIN [default].[dbo].[hr_record_fact] rc 
ON rc.EmployeeID = lv.EmployeeID

WHERE lv.IsActive = 'Y'

--select contractID from hr_contract_dim where ContractCode = 'CT' and IsActive = 'Y'


--select top(100) * FROM
--[default].[dbo].[calendar_dim]
